title: Awakens Dreams
summary: You can pull images from dreams and bring them to life in the waking world.
tiers: Tier 3: Dream Becomes Reality or Enhanced Intellect
Tier 6: Chamber of Dreams or Reactive Field
gm_intrusions: An unexpected sleepwalking episode puts the character into a dangerous situation. A nightmare breaks free of a dream.
text: You can pull images from dreams and bring them to life in the waking world.
details: You can pull images from dreams and bring them to life in the waking world.
